name: Omelet in a Bag
instructions: 1. Crack the eggs into a large resealable freezer bag. Press out most of the air and seal the bag. 2. Shake or squeeze the bag to beat the eggs. 3. Open the bag and add the chopped ham, shredded Cheddar cheese, diced tomato, sliced button mushrooms, chopped onion, and diced green bell pepper. If desired, add the salsa as well. 4. Squeeze out as much of the air as you can and seal the bag again. 5. Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Place the bag (up to 8 bags at a time) into the boiling water and cook for exactly 13 minutes. 6. Open the bag, and let the omelet roll out onto a plate. The omelet should roll out easily.
simpleInstructions: 1. Beat the eggs in a bag. 2. Add the ham, Cheddar cheese, tomato, button mushrooms, onion, green bell pepper, and salsa, then seal the bag with no air. 3. Boil the bag in water for 13 minutes. 4. Unseal and slide the omelet onto a plate.
